fight_director.tactical_objective: test whether one clear weapon clash reads on a fast draft route
fight_director.opponent_counter_pressure: enemy staff presses horizontally from screen left
fight_director.spatial_map: simple side axis, hero right, enemy left, no background change
fight_director.result_state: hero blade holds center line, enemy staff rebounds
fight_director.readability_plan: one direction, one contact, one result

combat_beat.screen_action: short blade blocks a staff press
combat_beat.tactical_meaning: hero stops the first pressure beat
combat_beat.contact_or_collision: staff hits blade at center frame

impact_system.pre_impact: staff enters from left as hero raises blade
impact_system.contact_frame: staff meets blade at center frame

vfx_power.visibility_rule: VFX must support action readability, not hide contact frame

camera_coverage.screen_direction: enemy pressure left to right, hero block right to left

provider_route_strategy.first_frame_plan: simple side frame with both weapons visible before contact
provider_route_strategy.end_frame_plan: optional, not required for fast draft test
provider_route_strategy.prompt_compression_rule: starting state, one action chain, one contact, one result

key_poses: weapon or limb enters the contact line
clear collision pose with readable overlap
brief hitstop at the contact point
end pose preserves the next cut direction
action_events: guard meets the weapon or strike
combat_tempo.force_feedback: hitstop, sparks or rain spray, and body recoil reveal force transfer
combat_tempo.major_traversal_window: short traversal or weapon entry resolves before contact; contact and reaction fill the back half
combat_tempo.speed_curve: anticipation, burst into contact, held impact frame, recoil, controlled end pose; front-load at least 60% of events before 70% of duration, then hold reaction or landing

prompt_human_readable_zh: Fast draft single-beat test: one side-view weapon clash with clear contact, sparks, rebound, and end pose.
prompt_canonical_en: Simple fast draft weapon clash test: locked medium side shot, staff presses in, short blade blocks, sparks, rebound, clear result.
provider_execution_prompt: Locked medium side shot, hero on screen right with short blade, enemy staff enters from screen left. The hero raises the blade and the staff clearly hits the blade at center frame. Small sparks burst, the staff rebounds slightly left, hero remains planted holding the center line. One action chain, one contact, one result. No camera shake, no extra hits, no VFX covering contact, no subtitles.

qc_evidence.action_readability: Fast draft prompt uses locked frame, one staff entry, one blade block, and one rebound.
qc_evidence.tactical_clarity: The test objective is only to prove a readable weapon clash.
qc_evidence.contact_believability: Staff hits the blade at center frame before sparks appear.
qc_evidence.impact_feedback: Small sparks, staff rebound, and sleeve snap mark the impact.
qc_evidence.spatial_continuity: Enemy pressure remains left-to-right and hero block remains right-to-left.
qc_evidence.vfx_readability: Only small sparks are allowed, so VFX cannot hide contact.
qc_evidence.style_consistency: The style remains simple 3D guoman draft language for a fast draft test.
qc_evidence.cutability: The planted hero end pose can cut into a counter shot.
